titleStmt.title: SII 5.993: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 993. (A.R. No. 128 of 1896). ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmātu puṇara puvimātu vaḷara ṉāmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpattan ṉiru patumalar manṉavar cūṭa maṉniya vurimaiyāl maṇimuṭi kavippa ceṅkolniṉṟu ticaitoṟum vaḷarppa veṅkali nikki meyyaṟan taḻaippa kaliṅka miriya kkaṭamalai naṭātti valaṅko ḷāḻi varaiyāḻi naṭappa Irucuṭaraḷavum Orukuṭai niḻaṟṟa virasiṁhāsa ṉattu mukkokkiḻāṉaṭikaḷoṭum vīṟṟirun=ta ruḷiya koppa
rakesarivanma rāṉa tribhu vaṉacakkaravattikaḷ śrīvikkiramacoḻatevaṟkku yāṇṭu 6 Āṟāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattuka kaḷattūrkkoṭṭattu taniyur śrīmaturān=ta kaccatuppetimaṅkalattu ma hāsabha yom Eḻuttu nammur Aruḷāharasiśvara muṭaiyama hāde var koyilil tevakaṉmikaḷum śrīmāheśvara kaṅkāṇi ceyvārkaḷuṅ kaṇṭu nammur talaippāṭakam viracoḻavāykkālukku teṟkku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇāṟṟilum mu
ṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟilum vīraṉārāyaṇavatikku meṟku E(ḻ)ḻāñ catirattu kīḻpāṟkkellai tiruvāyppāṭiyāḻvār tirumuṟṟaveliyāṉa viḷaikaḻanikku (meṟkku) meṟkkum tenpāṟk kellai paḷḷicceriyin vaṭamelai malaikalliṉa Eriyin vaṭakaraiyiṉ vaṭakkum vaṭameṟkkum peruvaḻi mukkol nikki Itukku vaṭakkum teṉpāṟkkellai maturān=ta kapereriyil Ālamaṭaikku teṟkil maṭaiyuḷ niṉṟum kiḻakkunokki ponta peruvaḻikku vaṭakkum melpāṟ
kkellai maturāntakapperēri karaikku kiḻakku nāṟkol nikki Itukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟk kellai matakunir puṟappāṭṭukku teṟku Eṇkol nikki Itukku teṟkkum Āka Innāṟpāl Ellaikkum Uṭpaṭṭa Irupattañcu pāṭakamum koppiracārapūmiyāy Ellomukkum cātāraṇam Ātalāl haruḷākarayiśva ram Ennum civaṉāmattāl koyilum Eṭuttum maṇṭapamum tiruccuṟṟumāḷikaiyum Eṭuttukaṭṭiyun tiruṉantavānamu maṭaiviḷākamum Uḷḷiṭṭu ve
ṇṭuvana ceykaikku viṭṭa Innilattukku vilaiyāka caṇṭeśvarade varpakkal nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa kācu 2 10 Irupatu maṟakkoṇṭu Innilan tantom Ivellaikkuḷḷu Ākkiṉa kamukukku kaṭamai koḷḷakkaṭavomallātomākavum Eṭuttuk kuṭiyirunta maṉaiyiṟai yuḷḷiṭṭu Epp(o)ṟpaṭṭa vari koḷḷakkaṭavomallātomākavum .
Digital edition of SII 5.993 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
